CreateInstances.document: Create a physical machine instance in Guangzhou Zone 1, use the CentOS 7.9 mirror, and enable IPv6.
CreateInstances.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: edgezone.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateInstances
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Zone": "ap-guangzhou-1",
    "InstanceType": "BMS5.MEDIUM8",
    "ImageId": "img-centos-7.9",
    "InstanceName": "my-epm-instance",
    "InstanceCount": 1,
    "VersionNumber": "7.9.2009",
    "PrivateNetworkId": "net-private-001",
    "PublicNetworkId": "net-public-001",
    "EnableIpv6": true
}
CreateInstances.title: Create a physical machine instance

CreateInstances.document: Create 3 physical machine instances in batches.
CreateInstances.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: edgezone.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateInstances
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Zone": "ap-guangzhou-1",
    "InstanceType": "BMS5.MEDIUM8",
    "ImageId": "img-centos-7.9",
    "InstanceName": "batch-instance",
    "InstanceCount": 3,
    "PrivateNetworkId": "net-private-001",
    "PublicNetworkId": "net-public-001"
}
CreateInstances.title: Batch create physical machine instances

CreateInstances.document: Create 3 physical machine instances in batches. Among them, 2 were successfully created, and 1 failed to create due to insufficient resources.

{

    "InstanceCount": 3,
    "PrivateNetworkId": "net-private-001",
    "PublicNetworkId": "net-public-001"
}

DescribeInstances.document: Query running instances in Guangzhou Zone 1

POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: edgezone.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: DescribeInstances
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Zone": "ap-guangzhou-1",
    "InstanceStatus": [
        "running"
    ],
    "Offset": 0,
    "Limit": 20
}

    "EndTime": "2026-04-23T08:00:00Z"
}
